changelog: Moods & Themes pack refreshed: the 50 weakly-matched 'additional' rows from v1.44.55 are GONE. Replaced with 18 hand-curated theme rows from the v3 curated pack — Movies Based On Video Games, Movies Based On Comic Books, Movies Ahead Of Their Time, Movies That Predicted The Future, Movies With The Best Villains, Movies With Anti-Heroes, Movies About AI Gone Wrong / Parallel Universes / Memory Loss / Escaping Prison / Gambling / Heists / Con Artists / Serial Killers / Cults / Loneliness, Movies Everyone Quotes, Cult Classic Movies. Original 26 hand-curated rows are unchanged.
All v1.44.56 features (CBC sports blacklist, Sports back-nav fix) still in place.
